## LibraryRuntime.LibraryRuntimeContext.createWeightContext() method

Creates a weight calculation context for unit-aware weight calculations. The context resolves ingredient IDs to their density values.

**Signature:**

```typescript
createWeightContext(): IWeightCalculationContext;
```
**Returns:**

[IWeightCalculationContext](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.internal.iweightcalculationcontext.md)

A weight calculation context bound to this runtime's library
